title: Remove urfave/cli from libpod
body:
This is the final cleanup to remove urfave/sli from libpod.  Removed
old, disabled tests that have not been run in over a year.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Am I missing something but I see lots of c.Bool and other urfave type stuff

grep c.Bool cmd/podman/*.go | wc -l
33

One thing I hate about the new interface.
1 GlobalOptions are showing up on each podman COMMAND --help, scrolling off the terminal the stuff I care about.
Why did the two test files disappear?  Also looks like you've a load error....
@rhatdan the c.bool is a convenience wrapper call as a PodmanCommand method.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #2307) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
